creator: hoek@hwcn.org
text:
On Fri, 19 Jun 1998, Andrey Zakhvatov wrote:

> sed 's/^X//' >battalion-1.4/pkg/DESCR << 'END-of-battalion-1.4/pkg/DESCR'
> XMonsters, explosions, destruction game for X Window System.
> XYou are a giant monster in a small city, being
> Xattacked by the military.
> X
> XHomepage: http://www.evl.uic.edu/aej/AndyBattalion.html

I think we can leave out the "Homepage: " tag.  Except in the
extremely rare case where multiple URLs should be listed at the
end of pkg/DESCR, it's just noise.


--
Outnumbered?  Maybe.  Outspoken?  Never!
tIM...HOEk
